meaning: n.[医]血液学学者,血液病学学者
examples: In November, German haematologist Gero Huetter announced that he had cured a man of HIV through a bone marrow transplant from a donor who had a genetic resistance to the virus.
Dr Phil Darbyshire, a consultant paediatric haematologist at Birmingham's Children's Hospital, said the findings echoed anecdotal evidence from patients.
"The facilities are so much better than the ones we had before, " consultant haematologist Dr Hannah Hunter told BBC News.
